summary: Full e2e testing of Rudralife Admin Dashboard upgrade. All features working: admin login, redirect to /admin, stats cards, filter panel (from/to date, gender), Apply Filter, clear filter, Export Excel button with count, table with all 11 columns, eye icon detail modal, date/gender filter API endpoints, export with no pagination limit, no admin links on public page.

design_issues.screen: Admin Dashboard - Top Goal stat card
issues: Shows 'Health & Wellness' but GOALS_MAP has key 'health_healing' -> 'Health & Healing'. DB stores different goal keys than what's in GOALS_MAP. Minor mismatch - goal values fall through to raw DB value display. Not a critical issue.

critical_code_review_comments: GOALS_MAP keys in AdminDashboard.js (e.g. 'health_healing') may not match the actual keys stored in MongoDB (appears DB stores 'health_wellness' or similar). This causes goal labels to display raw DB keys in some cases. Consider aligning GOALS_MAP with actual DB values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin dashboard features verified working in iteration 9. Login at /admin/login works with admin@rudralife.com/Rudralife@2024. Dashboard shows stats (32 total, 32 pending), filter panel with date+gender filters, Apply Filter, clear filter (X), Export Excel (32) button, all 11 table columns, detail modal with eye icon. Public landing page has no admin links. Backend: /api/admin/submissions (paginated+filtered), /api/admin/submissions/export (no limit, all data), both support from_date/to_date/gender params.
